leadText: The Pink Apricorn (Japanese: ももぼんぐり Pink Bonguri), formatted Pnk Apricorn prior to Generation VI, is a type of Apricorn introduced in Generation II. It can be used to make a Love Ball.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Pink Apricorn can be made into a Love Ball by Kurt . If used in the Apriblender , it can produce Aprijuice that boosts the Speed Performance stat.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description G S C A pink Apricorn . HG SS B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A pink Apricorn. It has a nice, sweet scent. S V A pink Apricorn. It has a pleasantly sweet scent.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] PSNCureBerry trees in Generation II are replaced by Pink Apricorn trees in Generation IV .
